About the School

Assumption College of Davao

A Catholic educational institution founded in 1958, committed to holistic formation rooted in Faith and Solidarity. ACD has been shaping leaders, scholars, and athletes in Davao City for over 6 decades.

Assumption College of Davao is a private Catholic school located in the heart of Davao City, Philippines. Founded by the Sisters of the Assumption, the school upholds the values of faith, service, and academic excellence.

The institution offers Junior High School, Senior High School, and College programs, nurturing students to become well-rounded individuals. Its basketball program is one of the most active sports organizations on campus, competing in various regional leagues and tournaments.

What to Expect

Tryout Information

Everything you need to know before signing up for the ACD Basketball Tryouts.

📋
Who Can Join
Open to all currently enrolled ACD students — JHS, SHS, and College. Walk-ins welcome but online registration is preferred.
📍
Location
Assumption College of Davao Campus Gymnasium — Davao City, Philippines.
👟
What to Bring
Basketball shoes, athletic wear, water bottle, and school ID. Come ready to play and give your best.
🏆
Positions Open
Point Guard, Shooting Guard, Small Forward, Power Forward, Center. All positions are being evaluated.
📞
Contact
For inquiries, reach us at 09317268545. We'll send you a confirmation message after submitting your form.
❤️
Our Values
We look for players with character, coachability, and commitment — not just skill. Faith and Solidarity guide our team.

Join the Team
